summary: TWO_ROW: top GREEN NumberLine (-1..3) for (R, +); bottom ORANGE NumberLine (0..10) for (R_>0, ×). ValueTracker a_tr sweeps 0→0.7→1.2→2→-0.5; always_redraw renders a YELLOW Dot at a on the additive line, a RED Dot at e^a on the multiplicative line, and a BLUE Arrow connecting them — the homomorphism exp. Bottom-right readout shows live a (DecimalNumber) and e^a (DecimalNumber). Caption: 'slide by a ⟺ stretch by e^a'.
